title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on healthcare and wellbeing systems.

questions.question: Do you think universal healthcare is a right that all governments should provide, or should individuals take more responsibility for funding their own care?
How has the COVID-19 pandemic changed attitudes towards public health, and what lessons should we take from it?

script.text: Do you think universal healthcare is a right that all governments should provide, or should individuals take more responsibility for funding their own care?
How has the COVID-19 pandemic changed attitudes towards public health, and what lessons should we take from it?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
